profile_backed_target.source: post-pass162 fixed-worker linalg profile plus target-only baseline

lever.summary: Widen the blocked GEMM SIMD register tile from NR=8 to NR=16

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Every output element still accumulated pc blocks in ascending pc order and l=0..kc in ascending order inside each pc block; widening the SIMD column tile only grouped independent output columns.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: No comparisons or tie-breaking behavior in matmul_2d.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: No FMA, mixed precision, horizontal reduction, or reassociation per output element.

validation.test_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1156319 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1156319 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-7wpc7-test cargo test -p fj-lax --lib matmul_2d -- --nocapture

benchmark.baseline_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1156319 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1156319 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-7wpc7-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64' --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 2 --measurement-time 10
benchmark.after_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1156319 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1156319 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-7wpc7-after cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64' --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 2 --measurement-time 10
benchmark.confirmation_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1156319 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1156319 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-7wpc7-after-confirm cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64' --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 3 --measurement-time 20

decision.reason: The first after-run had a median improvement but failed a conservative same-worker bound; the longer confirmation run was slower than baseline median. The source hunk was restored.
decision.next_primitive: Stop widening the same NR microkernel tile. Reprofile restored source and attack a deeper GEMM primitive such as cache-oblivious recursion/outer-panel scheduling, or route to the next fixed-worker top linalg row if GEMM no longer dominates.
